name: Grilled Sardines
tagline: Fresh sardines grilled whole with salt, lemon, parsley
highlight: Smoke-charred whole sardines — Mediterranean coast, no shellfish

hero.alt: Grilled whole sardines with lemon wedges and parsley
hero.caption: sardines — grilled whole

healthFacts: Sardines are sustainable, omega-3-rich, and packed with calcium (eat the bones).
Whole-fish grilling concentrates fat at the skin for incredible char.

steps.title: Pat dry, oil
steps.detail: Pat sardines bone-dry inside and out. Brush with olive oil; season with sea salt.
steps.tip: Wet fish sticks to the grill. Dry doesn't.

media.alt: Sardines on a tray with olive oil
media.caption: pat dry, oil

steps.title: Hot grill
steps.detail: Get grill grates ripping hot and oil them. Lay sardines down on a diagonal — don't move them for 3 min.
steps.tip: Hot grates + oil = clean release every time.

steps.title: Flip once
steps.detail: Flip with a fish spatula or a folded long thin spatula. Grill 2 min more until char marks deepen on the second side.
steps.tip: Eyes go opaque white when done. That's your tell.

steps.title: Lemon and parsley
steps.detail: Plate. Squeeze lemon, scatter parsley, grated garlic, chili flakes, drizzle olive oil.
steps.tip: Eat with the fingers. That's the way.
